name: car-rental-erp-root

scripts.dev: npx concurrently "npm run dev --prefix services/api-gateway" "npm run dev --prefix services/auth-service" "npm run dev --prefix Frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix services/api-gateway && npm install --prefix services/auth-service && npm install --prefix Frontend

description: Root package.json for starting all services concurrently. Do not commit if tracking other project members' work specifically.
